features.title: Business Analysis Domain Skill (harness-ba)
features.description: Create plugins/harness/skills/harness-ba/SKILL.md (~350-400 lines) following the 10-section pattern established by harness-ea. The skill activates when domain_profile: business_analysis is set. Includes BA methodology, verification strategy, evaluation criteria (completeness, traceability, stakeholder_alignment, feasibility), sprint contract checklists, and reference materials.
steps: Create the SKILL.md file at plugins/harness/skills/harness-ba/SKILL.md
Verify it follows the 10-section structural pattern of harness-ea
Verify all 4 evaluation criteria (completeness, traceability, stakeholder_alignment, feasibility) have complete 0-5 anchor tables
Verify the YAML frontmatter metadata block is present and correct
Verify Activation Check section verifies domain_profile is business_analysis
Verify BA Methodology table includes Waterfall BA, Agile BA, Lean BA, Design Thinking BA, Six Sigma BA
Verify Development Methodology first-action table includes Requirements-First, User-Story-First, Process-First, Data-First, Stakeholder-First
Verify Sprint Contract Checklists include templates for Requirements Elicitation, Use Case Development, Process Modeling, Gap Analysis, Stakeholder Review
Verify Repository Structure section defines business-analysis/ directory layout
evidence: 01-evaluation.json: all contract checks passed, all criteria scored 4
features.notes: Sprint 1 PASS. All 10 sections present, 373 lines.

features.title: Solution Architecture Domain Skill (harness-sa)
features.description: Create plugins/harness/skills/harness-sa/SKILL.md (~350-400 lines) following the 10-section pattern. The skill activates when domain_profile: solution_architecture is set. Distinct from harness-ea (enterprise architecture): SA focuses on a single solution's technical design. Includes SA methodology, evaluation criteria (design_coherence, technical_depth, integration_clarity, implementability), and sprint contract checklists.
steps: Create the SKILL.md file at plugins/harness/skills/harness-sa/SKILL.md
Verify it follows the 10-section structural pattern of harness-ea
Verify all 4 evaluation criteria (design_coherence, technical_depth, integration_clarity, implementability) have complete 0-5 anchor tables
Verify the YAML frontmatter metadata block is present and correct
Verify Activation Check section verifies domain_profile is solution_architecture
Verify SA Methodology table includes C4 Model, Arc42, 4+1 View, Domain-Driven Design, Microservices Patterns
Verify Development Methodology first-action table includes API-First, Component-First, Data-First, Event-First, Contract-First
Verify Sprint Contract Checklists include templates for Context & Constraints, Component Design, API Design, Data Design, NFR & Capacity
Verify Repository Structure section defines solution-architecture/ directory layout
features.notes: Sprint 2. Second high-priority skill, follows the pattern from sprint 1.

features.title: Deployment & Ops Domain Skill (harness-ops)
features.description: Create plugins/harness/skills/harness-ops/SKILL.md (~350-400 lines) following the 10-section pattern. The skill activates when domain_profile: ops is set. Covers deployment planning, infrastructure-as-code, CI/CD pipelines, runbooks, and operational readiness. Includes ops methodology, evaluation criteria (operational_readiness, automation_coverage, reliability_design, security_posture), and sprint contract checklists.
steps: Create the SKILL.md file at plugins/harness/skills/harness-ops/SKILL.md
Verify it follows the 10-section structural pattern of harness-ea
Verify all 4 evaluation criteria (operational_readiness, automation_coverage, reliability_design, security_posture) have complete 0-5 anchor tables
Verify the YAML frontmatter metadata block is present and correct
Verify Activation Check section verifies domain_profile is ops
Verify Ops Methodology table includes GitOps, Platform Engineering, SRE, DevOps, Infrastructure-as-Code
Verify Development Methodology first-action table includes Pipeline-First, Infrastructure-First, Monitoring-First, Runbook-First, Security-First
Verify Sprint Contract Checklists include templates for CI/CD Pipeline, Infrastructure Provisioning, Monitoring & Alerting, Runbook Development, Security Hardening
Verify Repository Structure section defines ops/ or infrastructure/ directory layout
features.notes: Sprint 3. Medium priority, same structural pattern as F-001 and F-002.

features.title: Phase Routing Table in SKILL.md
features.description: Update plugins/harness/skills/harness/SKILL.md to add routing entries for the three new domain skills in the Domain Skill Routing subsection and the Domain Skill References subsection. Also add solution_architecture and ops to the Domain Profiles table.
steps: Read current plugins/harness/skills/harness/SKILL.md
Add routing entries in Domain Skill Routing section for business_analysis, solution_architecture, and ops
Add rows to Domain Profiles table for solution_architecture and ops with their criteria, artifact types, and stakeholder lens
Add reference paragraphs in Domain Skill References section for harness-ba, harness-sa, and harness-ops
Verify no domain-specific logic is added to the planner or coordinator sections
features.notes: Sprint 4 (grouped with F-005). Depends on all three domain skills being complete.

features.title: Plugin Registration
features.description: Update plugins/harness/.claude-plugin/plugin.json to register the new skill paths so the plugin loader discovers them. The current './skills/' glob may already cover them, but verify and add explicit entries if needed.
steps: Read current plugins/harness/.claude-plugin/plugin.json
Verify the skills array discovery mechanism covers new subdirectories (harness-ba, harness-sa, harness-ops)
Add explicit skill paths if the './skills/' glob pattern does not cover new subdirectories
Verify JSON is valid after any changes
Verify plugin.json version field is unchanged (releaser handles version bumps)
features.notes: Sprint 4 (grouped with F-004). Small integration change -- verify glob coverage.
